chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-502 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.2196/2021 (E/ A). 03. For orders on maintability of main case. 16.11.2021 M/s. Ali Madad Arijo and Wakeel Ali Shaikh, Advocate(s) for petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = Heard. By way of this petition, the petitioner has sought for removal of Town Office Radhan, working on deputation; action against fake employees of Town Committee, Radhan and inquiry with regard to affairs of auction of Sabzi Mandi, Tender Fees and Utility Funds of Town Committee, Radhan. The controversy advanced to large extent is factual and factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed application, with an advice to the applicant to exhaust the alternate remedy with high-ups or otherwise. J U D G E J U D G E
